tests_performed.expected: Prints preview, does not call API, writes audit log

notes_for_orchestrator: Safety: always prints preview; blocks API call unless --confirm; --dry-run never calls API.
Audit logging: appends JSONL to N5/logs/careerspan_audit.jsonl for dry-runs, blocked (missing --confirm) attempts, success, and errors.
When --allowed-orgs is used without --org-scanning-enabled, script prints a warning but proceeds (per spec).
